vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

generated_parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine

verify.rule: Budget rule

verify.value: 0.2mm
verify.rule: Clearance_named
Standard_fit_vocabulary

verify.value: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads are visible and labeled.
verify.rule: Datum_visibility

verify.value: Wing spar socket, fuselage spine, and payload/battery service paths are separate and inspectable.
verify.rule: Wing_fuselage_interface

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to bolted interfaces without visible locking evidence.
risk.mit: Add visible locking evidence (e.g., washers, inserts) to bolted interfaces.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal stress on avionics bay if cooling airflow is not properly managed.
risk.mit: Implement cooling channel and airflow management features in the avionics bay.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance for moving parts may cause jamming or wear.
risk.mit: Ensure all moving parts have adequate clearance and fit language.

risk.desc: Potential for service access door to interfere with internal components.
risk.mit: Review and adjust the position of the service access door to avoid interference.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure if wing spar loads are not properly routed through the fuselage.
risk.mit: Verify and reinforce the structural integrity of the wing spar load path.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

Thermal dissipation from avionics to fuselage structure

internal_feature_targets.description: Main structural spine of the fuselage

integration_opportunities.description: Access for maintenance and servicing of internal components
Electrical harness routing through the fuselage
Cooling airflow channel for avionics bay

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces and rail guides
manufacturing_strategy.support: Orientation: vertical; Inspection: visual and tactile

risk.desc: Potential overestimation of mass budget.
risk.mit: Review and refine mass estimation process.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance for moving joints.

risk.desc: Lack of detailed thermal management plan.
risk.mit: Include cooling channels and heat sinks in design.
